hidden_defects.condition: Distinct dashboard hashes could previously satisfy stability history without proving an observed time span.
hidden_defects.impact: Operator could over-trust short-duration PAPER monitoring as long-run stability.
hidden_defects.reproducibility: Covered by short-span negative tests in tests/runtime/test_stability_history.py and tests/dashboard/test_read_only_dashboard.py.
hidden_defects.fix: Require minimum observed span and expose span status in dashboard long-run display.
hidden_defects.live_safety_impact: Live remains disabled; false-safe display path is reduced.
hidden_defects.ux_impact: Dashboard now shows observed span versus required span.
hidden_defects.profitability_impact: Prevents short samples from being mistaken for stable long-run evidence.
